ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wines" (
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine */,
  "title" TEXT /* Name of the wine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the wine */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation or classification of the wine (e.g., Vulkà Bianco) */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Rating points assigned to the wine */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the wine */,
  "variety" TEXT /* Variety of the wine (e.g., Chardonnay, Merlot) */,
  "winery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the winery that produced the wine */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the wine vintage */,
  "alcohol_content" REAL /* Alcohol content of the wine */,
  "acidity_level" TEXT /* Acidity level of the wine */,
  "sugar_content" TEXT /* Sugar content of the wine */,
  "tannin_level" TEXT /* Tannin level of the wine */,
  "bottle_size" TEXT /* Size of the wine bottle */,
  "grape_mix" TEXT /* Mix of grapes used in the wine */,
  "food_pairing" TEXT /* Suggested food pairings for the wine */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the wine bottle */,
  "vintage_quality" INTEGER /* Quality rating of the vintage year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_variety FOREIGN KEY ("variety") REFERENCES varieties ("variety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_winery_id FOREIGN KEY ("winery_id") REFERENCES wineries ("winery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wineries" (
  "winery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each winery */,
  "winery_name" TEXT /* Name of the winery */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the winery is located (e.g., Tuscany, Napa Valley) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the winery is located */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the winery was founded */,
  "winemaker" TEXT /* Name of the winemaker */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the winery's website */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the winery */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the winery */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email address of the winery */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the winery */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the winery */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Notable awards the winery has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("winery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wineries_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wineries_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "varieties" (
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variety */,
  "variety_name" TEXT /* Name of the variety */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variety */,
  "grape_color" TEXT /* Color of the grape */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the grape variety */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the grape */,
  "flavor_profile" TEXT /* Flavor profile of the grape */,
  "best_served_with" TEXT /* Best served with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variety_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Bordeaux, Tuscany) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "climate_type" TEXT /* Type of climate in the region */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the region */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the flag of the country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the province is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the province */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the province */,
  "climate_type" TEXT /* Type of climate in the province */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the province */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the province */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the province */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_1" (
  "region_1_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region level 1 */,
  "region_1_name" TEXT /* Name of the region level 1 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_1_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_2" (
  "region_2_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region level 2 */,
  "region_2_name" TEXT /* Name of the region level 2 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_2_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasters" (
  "taster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taster */,
  "taster_name" TEXT /* Name of the taster */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the taster */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the taster */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the taster */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any certifications the taster holds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine being reviewed */,
  "taster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the taster who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating assigned by the taster */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Detailed text of the review */,
  "aromas" TEXT /* Aromas detected in the wine */,
  "flavors" TEXT /* Flavors detected in the wine */,
  "acidity" TEXT /* Acidity level of the wine (as perceived by the taster) */,
  "tannins" TEXT /* Tannin level of the wine (as perceived by the taster) */,
  "sugar" TEXT /* Sugar content of the wine (as perceived by the taster) */,
  "bottle_size" TEXT /* Size of the bottle used for the review */,
  "vintage_quality" INTEGER /* Quality rating of the vintage year (as perceived by the taster) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_taster_id FOREIGN KEY ("taster_id") REFERENCES tasters ("taster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wine_varieties" (
  "wine_variety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine-variety association */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine */,
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the variety */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_variety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wine_varieties_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wine_varieties_variety_id FOREIGN KEY ("variety_id") REFERENCES varieties ("variety_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wine_regions" (
  "wine_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine-region association */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wine_regions_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wine_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., taster, winery, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions the user has */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
